title: narcissus × abilioi var. milagrosus
intro: Narcissus × abilioi var. milagrosus is a hybrid plant, specifically a variety of the Narcissus × abilioi, a type of daffodil known for its unique and fragrant flowers. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of edema. The health benefits of Narcissus × abilioi var. milagrosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising candidate for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers can be dried and used as a natural remedy for colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
